metadata.basis: Period-end CASA deposits / Period-end total deposits (domestic basis)
metadata.status: COMPLETE — 60 of 60 cells sourced. 2 cells estimated (ICICI Sep/Dec period-end — bank PDFs blocked; values derived from pattern).

SBI.source: SBI official press releases + Annual Report FY25

Bank_of_Baroda.source: BoB official press releases; Q3FY26 from Business Standard citing official filing

Punjab_National_Bank.basis: GLOBAL CASA share, period-end — PNB does not disclose domestic-only CASA quarterly. Treat as basis exception; global ≈ domestic given ~8% overseas deposits.
Punjab_National_Bank.source: PNB concall transcripts Q1/Q2 FY26; Q3FY26 press release; Directors' Report FY26; Groww citing Q4FY25 results

Canara_Bank.source: ICRA rating rationale reports; ICICIDirect quarterly updates

Union_Bank_of_India.basis: bank's primary reported CASA ratio (verified domestic at Q4FY26: CASA ₹4,59,988cr / deposits ₹13,06,297cr = 35.21%)
Union_Bank_of_India.source: JM Financial Q1FY26; ICRA Q2FY26; Business Standard Q3/Q4 FY26; Union Bank press release Q4FY26

Indian_Bank.source: Business Standard Q1FY26; Indian Bank official press releases Q2–Q4 FY26

HDFC_Bank.basis: period-end CASA / period-end total deposits (all-domestic; overseas negligible)
HDFC_Bank.source: HDFC Bank SEC Form 6-K filings Q1–Q4 FY26; ratios computed from disclosed balances

ICICI_Bank.basis: period-end CASA / period-end total deposits. Q4FY25 and Q1FY26 from external computed sources; Q2FY26 and Q3FY26 estimated (ICICI investor PDFs blocked); Q4FY26 from investor slide.
ICICI_Bank.source: Elara broker note Q4FY25 (41.8%); ICRA rating report Q1FY26 (41.2%); Multibagg Q4FY26 (41.4%); Q2/Q3 estimated from pattern
ICICI_Bank.notes: ICICI's average CASA (what it reports in press releases) is 2–3pp below period-end due to quarter-end CA seasonality. Period-end confirmed: Mar'25=41.8, Jun'25=41.2, Mar'26=41.4. Sep/Dec estimated in band 40.5–41.0%.

Axis_Bank.basis: MEB (month-end balance) CASA ratio — IS period-end by definition. Axis reports in whole integer percentages by design.
Axis_Bank.source: Axis Bank official press releases Q4FY25, Q1FY26, Q2FY26, Q3FY26, Q4FY26 (axisbank.com)
Axis_Bank.notes: All 5 confirmed from official Axis press releases. QAB (average) basis runs ~2pp lower.

Kotak_Mahindra_Bank.source: Kotak official press releases all 5 quarters

IndusInd_Bank.source: Business Standard Q4FY25 (32.8% confirmed); IndusInd press releases Q1–Q3 FY26; Business Standard + IndusInd Q4FY26 detailed release (31.24% from ₹1,24,933cr / ₹3,99,931cr)
IndusInd_Bank.notes: Q2FY26 stated as 31% in bank disclosures — single decimal not separately confirmed. Q4FY26 precise: ₹1,24,933cr CASA / ₹3,99,931cr deposits = 31.24%.

Federal_Bank.source: Federal Bank Q4FY25 concall transcript (30.23% MD-stated); Q1FY26 computed from press release (₹87,236cr / ₹2,87,436cr = 30.35%); Q2FY26 press release (31.01%); Q3FY26 Scanx/Angel One citing results (32.10%); Q4FY26 press release (32.94%)

soft_cells: IndusInd Q2FY26 exact decimal (31.00 per bank disclosure)
